name: Branch tree construction test
metric: leaf count; admissibility rate; terminal count

name: Branch measure normalization test
pass_condition: below declared tolerance or exact symbolic proof

name: Decoherence/separation simulation
metric: decoherence functional or branch inner product
pass_condition: macroscopic leaves approach declared noninterference threshold

name: Observer memory consistency
pass_condition: every committed record lies on a valid branch

name: Branch entropy growth study
metric: S_branch(t); monotonicity; saturation; relation to defects
pass_condition: matches declared theorem or falsifies it explicitly

name: Bridge map stability
metric: dimension; metric consistency; curvature proxies; fluctuation decay

name: Matched branch controls
metric: effect size of proposed ASH signature

name: Prospective prediction test
metric: prediction interval hit/miss; Bayes factor/log predictive density
